ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot interacting with a mobile phone, emphasizing the 'arrow' aspect of the emoji.  The animation will focus on the right arm, bringing the phone to the robot's face and then gesturing as if sending a message. The left arm will remain largely still for contrast. Frame 1 shows the arm extended, reaching for the phone. Frame 2 shows the phone brought up to the face, simulating looking at the screen. Frame 3 shows a slight downward movement, suggesting texting or tapping. Frame 4 shows the arm moving outward, as if sending the message.

frames.beat: right arm reaches out, holding an unseen phone
bringing the phone close to the face to read
a quick tap or swipe on the screen
the arm extends, sending the message away
